title: AgentSummary: periodic background summarization for sub-agents (parity with CC agentSummary.ts)
description:
## Goal
Implement periodic background summarization for coordinator-mode sub-agents, matching CC services/AgentSummary/agentSummary.ts (~179 lines).

## CC behavior (agentSummary.ts)
- startAgentSummarization(taskId, agentId, cacheSafeParams, setAppState): starts a timer, returns {stop}
- SUMMARY_INTERVAL_MS = 30_000 ms between summaries
- buildSummaryPrompt(previousSummary): 3-5 word present-tense action prompt, includes Previous hint when set
- runSummary(): reads current transcript via getAgentTranscript(agentId), skips if <3 messages; filters incomplete tool calls; forks agent with canUseTool=deny (no tools list change to avoid cache miss); extracts text block from result; calls updateAgentSummary(taskId, text, setAppState)
- Timer resets on completion (not initiation) to prevent overlapping summaries
- AbortController per summary tick; outer stop() cancels current tick and clears timer
- forkContextMessages rebuilt from transcript each tick (not pinned from closure)
- toolUseSummary service (toolUseSummaryGenerator.ts): separate Haiku-based tool-batch labeling for SDK clients; OC has no equivalent

## OC counterpart
None. OC has no agent progress summarization.

## Parent
#523. Phase 1 spec tracked in #534.
